have h_ub : ∃ A : Set ℝ, A.Finite ∧ (∀ B ⊆ A, B.ncard = 4 → (B - B).ncard = 11) ∧ (∀ S ⊆ A, IsSidon S → (S.ncard : ℝ) / A.ncard < 3 / 5) := by
    -- The existence of such a set is proved in [GyLe95, Theorem 4 and Corollary 1].
    -- For sufficiently large n, every P₁₁ set satisfies S.ncard / A.ncard ≤ (3 * n - 1) / (5 * n) < 3/5.
    sorry
  obtain ⟨A', hA'_fin, hA'_P11, hA'_S⟩ := h_ub
  apply sSup_lt_iff.mpr
  let c_max := (⨆ S : {S // S ⊆ A' ∧ IsSidon S}, (S.1.ncard : ℝ)) / A'.ncard
  have hc_max_lt : c_max < 3 / 5 := by
    unfold c_max
    simp only [Set.ncard_def]
    apply (div_lt_iff' (by exact_mod_cast A'.ncard_pos.mpr (by intro h; subst h;
      specialize hA'_P11 ∅ (by simp) (by simp); linarith))).mpr
    rw [iSup_mul]
    apply iSup_lt_iff.mpr
    intro ⟨S, hS_sub, hS_Sidon⟩
    exact (lt_div_iff' (by exact_mod_cast A'.ncard_pos.mpr (by intro h; subst h;
      specialize hA'_P11 ∅ (by simp) (by simp); linarith))).mp (hA'_S S hS_sub hS_Sidon)
  refine ⟨c_max, hc_max_lt, ?_⟩
  intro c hc
  specialize hc hA'_fin hA'_P11
  obtain ⟨S, hS_sub, hS_Sidon, hS_card⟩ := hc
  have : (S.ncard : ℝ) / A'.ncard ≤ c_max := by
    apply div_le_div_of_nonneg_right _ (by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le _))
    apply le_iSup (fun S : {S // S ⊆ A' ∧ IsSidon S} => (S.1.ncard : ℝ)) ⟨S, hS_sub, hS_Sidon⟩
  exact (le_div_iff' (by exact_mod_cast A'.ncard_pos.mpr (by intro h; subst h;
    specialize hA'_P11 ∅ (by simp) (by simp); linarith))).mp this

have : ∀ c, IsAdmissible c → c ≤ 3 / 5 := by
    intro c hc
    have h_ub : ∀ (A : Set ℝ), A.Finite → (∀ B ⊆ A, B.ncard = 4 → (B - B).ncard = 11) → (∃ S ⊆ A, IsSidon S ∧ c * A.ncard ≤ S.ncard) := hc
    sorry
  have h_strict : sSup {c | IsAdmissible c} ≠ 3 / 5 := by sorry
  exact lt_of_le_of_ne (sSup_le (λ c hc => (this c hc))) h_strict

refine lt_of_le_of_lt (sSup_le ?_) (by linarith)
  intro c hc
  obtain ⟨A, hA_fin, hA_P5, hA_Sidon⟩ := exists_set_no_large_sidon_subset c
  exact hA_Sidon (hc hA_fin hA_P5)
where
  exists_set_no_large_sidon_subset (c : ℝ) : ∃ (A : Set ℝ), A.Finite ∧ (∀ B ⊆ A, B.ncard = 4 → (B - B).ncard = 11) ∧ (∀ S ⊆ A, IsSidon S → (S.ncard : ℝ) < c * A.ncard) := sorry

    exact Set.finite_singleton 17

    intro B hB hB_card
    -- This follows from the fact that {0, 1, 4, 6, 11, 15, 17} is a Q-set.
    sorry
  rcases hc hA hQ with ⟨S, hS_sub, hS_sidon, hS_card⟩
  have hS_max : S.ncard ≤ 4 := by
    -- The maximum Sidon subset of this Q-set has size 4.
    sorry
  exact (le_div_iff₀ (by norm_num)).mpr (by linarith)

  have : ∃ A : Set ℝ, A.Finite ∧ (∀ B ⊆ A, B.ncard = 4 → (B - B).ncard = 11) ∧ (A.ncard : ℝ) = 7 ∧ (∀ S ⊆ A, IsSidon S → (S.ncard : ℝ) ≤ 4) := sorry

  exact (le_div_iff' (by rw [hn]; norm_num)).mpr (hScard.trans (hs S hSA hSidon))
